lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

blockingIssues.description: SalesReturnService still keeps local idempotency helper implementations (`normalizeToken` and `sha256Hex`) outside `core.idempotency`, violating the feature's deduplication requirement.
ProductionCatalogService still defines a local `sha256Hex(MultipartFile file)` helper, so hashing helper logic is not fully centralized to `core.idempotency`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update validator guidance to align with mission policy: use `mvn test -Pgate-fast -Djacoco.skip=true` baseline (and unit suite when needed), and remove/avoid `mvn test -T4`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Observed across multiple reviews (fix-critical-auth-bugs, fix-critical-payroll-hr-bugs, fix-sales-accounting-purchasing-bugs, extract-shared-idempotency-framework) that backend-worker instructions conflict with AGENTS guidance and led to procedure deviations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance that schema changes must be mirrored across both Flyway tracks (`src/main/resources/db/migration` and `src/main/resources/db/migration_v2`) when both are active in test/runtime paths.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-critical-payroll-hr-bugs handoff reported first-pass failure caused by column missing in migration_v2 path after only one track was updated.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD evidence expectations (what qualifies as proof of a red-phase run) and how to score micro-fixes that reuse existing tests but do not add new failing tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews flagged inconsistent test-first evidence interpretation in fix-sales-accounting-purchasing-bugs and unify-error-handling-and-validation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure feature descriptions are refreshed when pre-existing failure assumptions change, so workers are not told to tolerate already-fixed failures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-critical-auth-bugs feature description still references a tolerated gate-fast failure while AGENTS states that failure was already resolved and gate-fast passes 377/377.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate reports that backend-worker test command guidance conflicts with AGENTS
`IdempotencyReservationService` is instantiated with `new` in some modules despite being a Spring `@Service`
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous (may be deliberate utility-style usage; not enough evidence of correctness issue)

rejectedObservations.observation: Unify-error-handling-and-validation review noted missing direct unit tests for modified MFA activate/disable invalid branches
rejectedObservations.reason: feature-specific non-blocking quality note, not shared-state guidance
